title: acer buergerianum var. ningpoense
intro: Acer buergerianum var. ningpoense, also known as the Ningpo Paperbark Maple, is a deciduous tree species in the Sapindaceae family. Traditionally, this plant is used in Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acer buergerianum var. ningpoense include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the bark of this tree is often made into a decoction or infused in tea, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized for therapeutic purposes.
